title: Cobblemon Nebula
description: Modpack (non-required) for the Cobblemon Nebula Server, with some Quality of Life, light additions!
body:
> Welcome to Cobblemon Nebula! Immerse yourselves in an adventure-rich experience - this can be in exploring the open world and various new biomes, advancing your PokeDex, becoming a Gym Leader and SO much more! Hope to see you there, Voyagers! > This Modpack is NOT a requirement to play on the server, but adds quality-of-life enhancing mods to aid your experience the best way possible. # How to use this Modpack! > To use this modpack, simply download and click play. Once loaded, enter our IP on the multiplayer section of Minecraft, and you will be able to connect to our server! (IP = play.nebula.com). To expand on our features as listed below, here are a few more that you will be able to find on our server! - GTS - Player-Ran Gyms - Pwiki - Dex Rewards - Mega Evolution (Though currently lacking the models, the mechanic still functions appropriately!) - Pokebuilder - Breeding & Daycare System - Mass Outbreaks - Adjusted Wild Spawn Levels according to your overall party level - Daily Check-in Rewards - Wondertrade - Pokegift - Flan Claiming System - Terralith Biome Generation - Cosmetic Ranks - Cosmetic Trails & Particle Effects - Block, Decoration, Trivia and Vote Shops Available - Shiny Boosts + Shiny Weekends - Engaging Events __**Coming Soon!**__ - Raids - Dungeons
